name: Matias | Nirvino Series
description:
"In a distant universe so far away your brain can't comprehend lays a planet called Nirvino."

-Part 1 of the Nirvino series

Matias (Crow Hybrid)

Matias Backstory: "Always a rebellious child growing up in the land that was hidden amongst the stars, always the final crow to dissapear from the night sky, always seen by human eye." Matias grew up in a kingdom that belonged to King Apricity whom had long since dissappeared. After becoming an adult, breaking many rules and missing many communal prayers to their lord, he was banished from the kingdom in the stars, and thrown from Plusati (A large star in their universe) down to earth.

☆Story Background; In a universe so far away, in a place your brain can't even comprehend lays a universe called 22-B. Inside of it is a planet called Nirvino. Nirvino, millions of years before Earth even formed, was ruled in two kingdoms. One was ruled by Queen Aesthete, her kingdom had many nicknames, truth, yin, heaven, light, good, prayer. And King Apricity who's kingdom went by the nicknames of; Lies, yang, hell, dark, bad, sin.

Now, people in this universe were different from those in yours, they evolved, with animal DNA mixing with human DNA creating Demi-humans. Although, none of that matters now as Aesthete has long been dead and Apricity has been missing.

Humans lost their unique DNA and evolced much quicker than Earth ever did, however for those who never lost their DNA, they were often put into zoos, circuses, or made into slaves (Sound familiar? Try Earth.. early 1800s)

Matias is a rebellious Crow who is mortified when he comes to learn the state of the planet, and other demihumans like him.
creator: C0sm1cLvr
